reasoning: Trump issued an executive order to defund NPR and PBS on May 3, 2025. However, the Corporation for Public Broadcasting (CPB) is an independent entity created and funded by Congress, making it largely insulated from direct presidential directives regarding fund distribution. NPR and PBS immediately announced legal challenges to the executive order. Given that the Keep_Track project 2025 tracker is managed by fact-based researchers (Rusticgorilla and Mollynaquafina), they are highly unlikely to mark the objective of "stop funding" as "Complete" while the executive order is legally enjoined or while CPB continues to distribute congressionally appropriated funds. Realizing this objective fully would likely require Congress to pass legislation defunding the CPB, which is very unlikely to occur before the July 1, 2025 resolution date due to typical congressional budget timelines. Thus, the objective will likely remain "In Progress."
